topic: A person making a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
raw_generation:
{
  "script": "INT. KITCHEN - DAY
A cozy kitchen. A person named Maya stands at the counter with bread, peanut butter, jelly, a knife, and a plate.
MAYA: Hi everyone! Today we're making a quick peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
Action: Maya opens the bread bag and lays two slices on a plate.
MAYA: Step one: lay out two slices of bread.
Action: Maya opens the peanut butter and uses a knife to spread a smooth layer on one slice.
MAYA: Step two: spread peanut butter on one slice.
Action: Maya wipes the knife and spreads jelly on the other slice.
MAYA: Step three: spread jelly on the other slice.
Action: Maya places the two slices together and presses gently.
MAYA: Step four: put the slices together. If you like, cut the sandwich in half.
Action: Maya cuts diagonally and places the halves on the plate.
MAYA: And that's it—PB&J ready to enjoy!
",
  "narration": "Narrator: Welcome to a quick kitchen classic. Here, Maya shows four simple steps to a peanut butter and jelly sandwich. Step one: lay out two slices of bread. Step two: spread peanut butter on one slice. Step three: spread jelly on the other slice. Step four: press the slices together and, if you like, cut the sandwich in half. Tip: choose creamy or chunky peanut butter, grape or strawberry jelly, and you can add banana for extra flavor. Enjoy!"
}

parsed_generation.script:
INT. KITCHEN - DAY
A cozy kitchen. A person named Maya stands at the counter with bread, peanut butter, jelly, a knife, and a plate.
MAYA: Hi everyone! Today we're making a quick peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
Action: Maya opens the bread bag and lays two slices on a plate.
MAYA: Step one: lay out two slices of bread.
Action: Maya opens the peanut butter and uses a knife to spread a smooth layer on one slice.
MAYA: Step two: spread peanut butter on one slice.
Action: Maya wipes the knife and spreads jelly on the other slice.
MAYA: Step three: spread jelly on the other slice.
Action: Maya places the two slices together and presses gently.
MAYA: Step four: put the slices together. If you like, cut the sandwich in half.
Action: Maya cuts diagonally and places the halves on the plate.
MAYA: And that's it—PB&J ready to enjoy!
parsed_generation.narration: Narrator: Welcome to a quick kitchen classic. Here, Maya shows four simple steps to a peanut butter and jelly sandwich. Step one: lay out two slices of bread. Step two: spread peanut butter on one slice. Step three: spread jelly on the other slice. Step four: press the slices together and, if you like, cut the sandwich in half. Tip: choose creamy or chunky peanut butter, grape or strawberry jelly, and you can add banana for extra flavor. Enjoy!

feedback: The output adheres to the topic and keeps Maya as the central actor with a clear PB&J workflow. Narration adds practical tips beyond the visuals. To better align with the concise, action-first style in the references, tighten the script by reducing explanatory narration and standardizing on direct on-screen actions.
fixes: Adopt a tighter, action-first prompt style (minimize descriptive narration in favor of on-screen actions)
Standardize shot cues (e.g., INT. KITCHEN - DAY, close-ups of bread and spreads), reducing meta-narrative lines
Limit extra tips in narration to keep focus on concrete steps while preserving helpful guidance
